calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-15-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Presiding Judge Dept. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Commissioner William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: L. Jones.
Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. special appearance for Plaintiff: Capital One Bank (U.S.A.), N.A.
No appearance by the Defendant Paul Manasian.
Declaration of Plaintiff in lieu of live testimony at trial received and filed in court.
After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Principal $2,179.00
Prejudgment Interest $1,425.94
Attorney's Fees $485.00
Costs $288.00, for a Total of $4,316.94
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-15-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-25-2009 Set For Trial On Jun-15-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
